meta.title: OBSIDIAN — Marketplace Education & Consulting
meta.description: OBSIDIAN — a team of seven specialists guiding sellers from zero to scaled on marketplaces: strategy, logistics, content, SEO, advertising, legal structure and AI automation.

hero.title: We turn sellers into marketplace leaders.
hero.subtitle: Seven specialists. One mission — to take you from your first listing to a scaled, profitable marketplace business.

team.label: 02 — TEAM
team.title: One team. Seven specialists.
team.intro: Each specialist owns a stage of your marketplace journey.

members.name: Mubashshir
members.role: AI Automation Engineer & Web App Developer

rashidBeats.title: From the bazaar floor
rashidBeats.body: Rashid started in traditional trade — stalls, cash and instinct. This is where the OBSIDIAN story begins.

rashidBeats.title: $170,000 in debt
rashidBeats.body: A crisis left him $170,000 in debt, with everything on the line and no room for error.

rashidBeats.title: 17 m² in Moscow
rashidBeats.body: He rebuilt from a single 17 m² room in Moscow — every shelf earning its place.

rashidBeats.title: Two warehouses
rashidBeats.body: Disciplined systems turned that room into two fully operating warehouses.

rashidBeats.title: Why I chose marketplaces
rashidBeats.body: He left the limits of traditional business for the reach and leverage of marketplaces.

rashidBeats.title: Bazaar vs marketplace
rashidBeats.body: Fixed costs, local reach and guesswork — versus data, scale and a national audience.

rashidBeats.title: Commerce is moving online
rashidBeats.body: The customer is already online. The future of retail is digital shelves, not physical ones.

rashidBeats.title: What to do next
rashidBeats.body: Start lean, master the numbers, and build systems — the same path he now teaches sellers.

mubashshirBeats.title: AI that runs your operations
mubashshirBeats.body: Mubashshir automates and digitizes business processes with modern AI — saving time and tightening control.

mubashshirBeats.title: Telegram bots
mubashshirBeats.body: Custom bots that handle orders, alerts and customer flows around the clock.

mubashshirBeats.title: Live dashboards
mubashshirBeats.body: Real-time dashboards that turn scattered data into decisions at a glance.

mubashshirBeats.title: Google Sheets integration
mubashshirBeats.body: Your tools and stores wired straight into Google Sheets — synced automatically.

mubashshirBeats.title: Web applications
mubashshirBeats.body: Tailored web applications that give your business its own control panel.

mubashshirBeats.title: Full digitalization
mubashshirBeats.body: AI, bots, dashboards and apps connected into one system that runs your store.
